title: send_fn_box comment explains what (per-call connection) but not why
description: commands.rs line 131: comment says 'Connects to lightwalletd on every call'. Does not explain why a persistent connection isn't held. A contributor will 'fix' this by hoisting LightwalletdClient creation outside the closure. Fix: add: 'A new connection per call avoids storing LightwalletdClient across await points in the chat loop, which would require Arc<Mutex<...>>.'
